title: Exceptional matric results for Oakhill
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Advertorial","html":"Advertorial"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Oakhill School’s commitment to whole-child education and excellence has recently been exemplified by the Class of 2024’s outstanding Matric results in their Independent Examinations Board (IEB) exams. With 94 distinctions among 34 matriculants - averaging 2.77 distinctions per candidate - Oakhill has maintained its esteemed academic reputation.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Oakhill School’s commitment to whole-child education and excellence has recently been exemplified by the Class of 2024’s outstanding Matric results in their Independent Examinations Board (IEB) exams. With 94 distinctions among 34 matriculants - averaging 2.77 distinctions per candidate - Oakhill has maintained its esteemed academic reputation."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Additionally, 21 subject marks exceeded 90%, and the 2024 Matrics achieved a grade average of 73%, with nearly all subjects surpassing the IEB national average."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Whole-child education happens in the broadest sense of the word at Oakhill and this involves much more than the excellent academic standards maintained. From Grade 000 to Grade 12 Oakhill strives to ignite the imaginations of all students, by encouraging them to explore and discover, question and create, and to experience the joy of learning.","html":"Whole-child education happens in the broadest sense of the word at Oakhill and this involves much more than the excellent academic standards maintained. From Grade 000 to Grade 12 Oakhill strives to ignite the imaginations of all students, by encouraging them to explore and discover, question and create, and to experience the joy of learning."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Joy of Learning Extends Beyond SchoolAt Oakhill the joy of learning, as the cornerstone of the school’s ethos, is evident across the campus. Students are encouraged to seize the many opportunities provided, fostering both academic and personal growth.","html":"The Joy of Learning Extends Beyond School
At Oakhill the joy of learning, as the cornerstone of the school’s ethos, is evident across the campus. Students are encouraged to seize the many opportunities provided, fostering both academic and personal growth."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Oakhill’s consistent 100% Independent Examinations Board (IEB) pass rate since inception and exceptional performance above the national average, across subjects this past year, highlight the dedication of both pupils and staff.","html":"Oakhill’s consistent 100% Independent Examinations Board (IEB) pass rate since inception and exceptional performance above the national average, across subjects this past year, highlight the dedication of both pupils and staff."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"More importantly, the school prepares students not just for examinations but for finding their place in a globalised world, ensuring they are ready to thrive and make a meaningful impact."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The ethos fosters a strong sense of self and encourages students to find their niche, equipping Matric leavers with the tools for success and fulfillment well beyond school.","html":"The ethos fosters a strong sense of self and encourages students to find their niche, equipping Matric leavers with the tools for success and fulfillment well beyond school."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Oakhill graduates have excelled in their chosen fields, gaining entry to competitive courses at leading tertiary institutions. Their studies include Actuarial Science, Medicine, various Engineering disciplines, BSc degrees, Computer Science, Physiotherapy, Occupational Therapy, and more. A vast number of graduates have progressed to postgraduate Honours and Masters levels.","html":"Oakhill graduates have excelled in their chosen fields, gaining entry to competitive courses at leading tertiary institutions. Their studies include Actuarial Science, Medicine, various Engineering disciplines, BSc degrees, Computer Science, Physiotherapy, Occupational Therapy, and more. A vast number of graduates have progressed to postgraduate Honours and Masters levels."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Oakhill’s strength and exceptional faculties in Creative, Dramatic Arts, and Music have also enabled students to pursue creative arts degrees; from motion design, to contemporary art and music technology; both locally and internationally, often with prestigious scholarships."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A notable number of graduates study abroad, thriving at universities in countries such as the Netherlands, France, Italy, Sweden, Switzerland, Taiwan, the UK, and the USA, further showcasing the global opportunities an Oakhill education provides.","html":"A notable number of graduates study abroad, thriving at universities in countries such as the Netherlands, France, Italy, Sweden, Switzerland, Taiwan, the UK, and the USA, further showcasing the global opportunities an Oakhill education provides."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Oakhill Scholarship: Future Opportunities to ShineFor future generations, Oakhill offers wonderful scholarship opportunities for students to showcase their unique talents and pursue excellence in academics, culture, and sport. This prestigious programme is designed to inspire and support outstanding Grade 8 pupils as they embark on their high school journey at Oakhill College.","html":"Oakhill Scholarship: Future Opportunities to Shine
For future generations, Oakhill offers wonderful scholarship opportunities for students to showcase their unique talents and pursue excellence in academics, culture, and sport. This prestigious programme is designed to inspire and support outstanding Grade 8 pupils as they embark on their high school journey at Oakhill College."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In response to growing interest, Oakhill is excited to announce an extension of its scholarship programme to younger students. Grade 4 to Grade 7 pupils now have the chance to apply for a limited number of merit-based scholarships in the Prep School.","html":"In response to growing interest, Oakhill is excited to announce an extension of its scholarship programme to younger students. Grade 4 to Grade 7 pupils now have the chance to apply for a limited number of merit-based scholarships in the Prep School."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Aimed at cultivating potential, the scholarship provides an opportunity for students to challenge themselves while experiencing Oakhill’s ethos of the joy of learning."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Successful candidates earn the honour of joining a tried-and-tested independent school that values whole-child education, empowering students to thrive academically and personally while preparing them for an ever-evolving future.","html":"Successful candidates earn the honour of joining a tried-and-tested independent school that values whole-child education, empowering students to thrive academically and personally while preparing them for an ever-evolving future."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Apply today to embrace this exciting opportunity to shine! The scholarship applications close on Wednesday, 19 February 2025.","html":"Apply today to embrace this exciting opportunity to shine! The scholarship applications close on Wednesday, 19 February 2025."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Connect and converse at an information evening or see Oakhill’s website for further details: www.oakhill.co.za.","html":"Connect and converse at an information evening or see Oakhill’s website for further details: www.oakhill.co.za."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
